prompt.content:
Calculate the average percentage of medicare payments as a proportion of all covered charges (based on payments detail) for hospitals in pilot states, as identified in the rollout plan. Only consider hospitals which have emergency services (as indicated in hospitals general information). Report final answer in console.

Round percentages to two decimal points. Disregard column "average_medicare_payments_2" in the payment detail sheet.

rubrics.name: States that the average % medicare payments for IL is 21.07% (acceptable range... (ver_fae9cb654f1549d795d8ba802562d301)

messages.content: States that the average % medicare payments for IL is 21.07% (acceptable range 20.86% to 21.28%).

rubrics.name: States that the average % medicare payments for IL is a value other than 21.07% (ver_fae9cb654f1549d795d8ba802562d301)

messages.content: States that the average % medicare payments for IL is a value other than 21.07%.

messages.content: States that the average % medicare payments for MI is a value other than 31.65%.
